name: Northpass (Gainsight) Customer Education API
what_it_does: Northpass (now Gainsight Customer Education) REST API for customer education, partner training, and onboarding LMS. Enables AI agents to manage learner enrollment and course assignment for automated customer onboarding training, handle course completion tracking and certification for customer success automation, access custom portal and white-label configuration for branded education hub management, retrieve learning analytics and customer engagement for customer success intelligence, manage content library and learning path for structured customer education programs, handle gamification and certification for customer training incentive automation, access SSO-integrated learner provisioning for seamless customer portal access, retrieve completion webhooks and event data for customer success platform automation, manage channel partner training and certification for partner enablement programs, and integrate Northpass with Gainsight CS, Salesforce, Intercom, and customer success platforms.
use_cases: Onboarding customers from customer success agents
Certifying channel partners from partner enablement agents
Tracking product adoption from education analytics agents
Automating training from customer lifecycle agents
not_for: Internal employee compliance training (use Absorb or TalentLMS)
Complex blended learning with ILT management
best_when: A SaaS company or technology vendor wanting AI agents to automate customer onboarding training, product certification, partner enablement, and customer education with deep integration into customer success platforms like Gainsight.
avoid_when: GAINSIGHT ACQUISITION INTEGRATION CHANGES: Northpass was acquired by Gainsight in 2022; API and product roadmap are evolving as Northpass integrates into Gainsight platform; verify current Northpass API stability and migration timeline before deep integration investment; product consolidation may change endpoint structure. CUSTOMER PII AND GDPR IN EDUCATION PORTAL: Automated customer learner data in Northpass constitutes personal data under GDPR; automated retention of EU customer learning history beyond legitimate purpose and failure to honor erasure requests creates GDPR violation; implement customer data erasure workflow for EU customer churn. SSO-PROVISIONED LEARNER ACCESS CONTROL: Automated SSO-based learner provisioning for customer portal access must correctly map customer entitlement to training content; automated overprovisioning of restricted training content (e.g., premium certification courses) to free-tier customers creates license violation. WEBHOOK EVENT RELIABILITY FOR CS PLATFORM TRIGGERS: Northpass completion webhooks used to trigger Gainsight or Salesforce customer success actions must implement idempotent event processing; duplicate webhook delivery can create duplicate health score updates or multiple triggered actions.

auth.notes: Northpass uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ (Gainsight Inc., now part of Vista Equity Partners portfolio). Northpass founded 2013 in New York City; acquired by Gainsight 2022. Gainsight is a customer success platform company. Northpass provides customer education LMS integrated with Gainsight CS. Competes with Skilljar, Thought Industries, and LearnUpon for customer education LMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription based on learner volume and features
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by learner volume and feature tier; now bundled with Gainsight CS enterprise agreements
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Gainsight subsidiary. Northpass acquired 2022. Vista Equity Partners portfolio. Annual subscription by learner volume. Gainsight CS enterprise bundle option.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; course and learner API calls throttled per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: GAINSIGHT ACQUISITION API EVOLUTION: Northpass API and product are evolving post-Gainsight acquisition (2022); endpoint structure, authentication, and feature coverage may change as Northpass integrates into Gainsight platform; monitor Gainsight developer changelog and implement API version pinning

WEBHOOK IDEMPOTENCY FOR CS PLATFORM INTEGRATION: Northpass completion webhooks used to trigger Gainsight or Salesforce CS actions must implement idempotent event processing with learner-ID + course-ID + completion-date deduplication; duplicate webhook delivery creates duplicate health score events and multiple triggered CS workflows

SSO LEARNER PROVISIONING ENTITLEMENT MAPPING: Automated SSO-based customer learner provisioning must correctly map customer subscription tier to training content entitlement; automated overprovisioning of restricted (premium) certification content to free-tier customers creates license contract violation

GDPR EU CUSTOMER EDUCATION DATA ERASURE: Automated EU customer learner data in Northpass must be erasable on GDPR Article 17 request or customer churn; automated retention of EU customer completion history beyond contractual relationship period creates GDPR violation; implement customer data erasure workflow

Gainsight CS health score integration latency — Northpass course completion webhooks to Gainsight CS for health score updates have processing latency; automated customer health score calculation immediately after completion webhook may use stale data; implement brief delay or poll Gainsight CS for health score confirmation

White-label portal domain and SSL configuration — Northpass custom education portal requires domain configuration and SSL certificate; automated portal provisioning for new customer segments requires DNS propagation time (24-48 hours); plan automated portal setup with DNS lead time before customer onboarding
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer education LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Customer learner and training data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer education LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Customer learning and certification data.
